name: Salt & Oak
email_subject: Your 4.8★ Restaurant Deserves a Digital Presence | Free Website Preview Inside
email_body:
Hello,

Here's what I discovered about your digital opportunity:

I've created a demo website preview showing exactly what a professional online presence looks like for Salt & Oak:

This includes all the features shown in your demo, plus 3 months of optimization support.

Why Act Now?

name: Noi Friendly
email_subject: Noi Friendly's 4.8★ Rating + Professional Website = More Diners | See Preview
email_body:
Hello,

I've been following Noi Friendly and I'm genuinely impressed—your 4.8-star rating with 208 reviews speaks volumes about the quality of your authentic Thai cuisine and warm hospitality. Your guests clearly love what you're doing.

But here's what I noticed: customers are tagging you on Instagram (35+ posts!), yet you don't have a business account to engage back with them. That's potential revenue walking away.

3 Critical Digital Gaps:

1. No Official Website — When tourists search "authentic Thai food Bo Put" or "family-run Thai restaurant," Noi Friendly doesn't appear. You're relying 100% on walk-ins and word-of-mouth.

2. No Owned Social Media Presence — Instagram users are tagging your location, but you can't communicate back, run promotions, or direct them to make reservations. That's lost relationship-building.

3. No Online Reservation System — Potential guests who want to book ahead (common for tourists planning meals) have no way to reach you except calling.

Here's Your Solution:

I've created a demo website specifically designed for Noi Friendly—showing how to leverage your authentic reputation online:

name: THAI KITCHEN RESTAURANT
email_subject: Your 4.9★ Restaurant + Professional Website = Premium Positioning | Demo Inside
email_body:
Hello,

I've researched the restaurants in Fisherman's Village, and THAI KITCHEN RESTAURANT stands out—your 4.9-star rating with 127 reviews is the highest in the area. Your guests rave about authentic Thai food, fresh organic ingredients, and genuine hospitality. That's not easy to achieve.

But I noticed something surprising: a restaurant with your caliber of ratings has almost zero online presence. You're essentially invisible except for TripAdvisor and Google Maps listings you don't control. That's costing you bookings.

3 Specific Digital Gaps (Despite Your Excellence):

1. No Website at All — Tourists in Fisherman's Village search online for "authentic Thai restaurant" or "best Thai food" before visiting. Your competitors with websites appear; you don't. You're losing bookings to restaurants with lower ratings but better online visibility.

2. Zero Social Media Presence — No Facebook, no Instagram. You can't showcase your beautiful dishes, share your story about cooking from scratch with organic ingredients, or build a following. That's a massive missed opportunity in a tourist-heavy location.

3. No Online Reservation System — Guests planning group dinners or special occasions have no way to book ahead. Walk-ins are great, but you're leaving seated-table bookings on the table.

What Premium Positioning Looks Like:

I've created a demo website designed for THAI KITCHEN RESTAURANT—showing how to position your restaurant as THE authentic Thai choice in Fisherman's Village:

View Your Demo Website →

Your demo showcases:

  • Professional photography of your authentic dishes and dining experience
  • Your story: organic ingredients, from-scratch cooking, traditional recipes
  • Online reservation system with same-day availability
  • Facebook & Instagram integration to build your following
  • SEO optimization so "authentic Thai food Fisherman's Village" shows YOU first
  • Customer reviews displayed prominently (your 4.9★ rating is your best marketing)
  • WhatsApp & phone booking buttons for easy contact

💰 Premium Website Investment:
• Professional Website (Premium Design): $1,000 - $1,500 (one-time)
• Monthly Hosting & Support: $40 - $50/month

Includes professional food photography strategy, SEO setup, and 3 months of social media management.

The Real Opportunity:

You're in the best location (Fisherman's Village is a tourist hotspot) with the best reviews (4.9★ beats every competitor). But you're completely invisible online. Your competition? Restaurants with lower ratings who invested in websites are getting the bookings. This is a straightforward win: put your excellence where customers are looking, and booking volume increases immediately.

A professional website positions THAI KITCHEN RESTAURANT as the premium, authentic choice—not the hidden gem that tourists stumble upon by accident.

👉 Reply to schedule a free 15-min call — Let's discuss how to translate your 4.9★ reputation into consistent bookings.

Your restaurant deserves to be as discoverable online as it is excellent in person.

Best regards,
Your Web Development Partner
